_comment: WS-6a capstone spec: prove the D2MOO reimpl of DUNGEON_GetTownLevelIdFromActNo against the live PD2 original. Resolved by VERIFIED OFFSET 0x3b1e0 (=242144) for robustness. (History: the PD2 Ghidra name was the generic DATATBLS_GetBoundedArrayValue; renamed 2026-07-07 to the D2MOO canonical name, so names now align -- but offset resolution is used regardless since fun-doc supplies the offset from Ghidra.) Vectors are act 0..4 ONLY -- the original aborts the process for act>4.
name: DUNGEON_GetTownLevelIdFromActNo
